creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
deluge* package building is currently being skipped due to "py27-libtorrent-rasterbar-1.2.2" which is currently being ignored due to being marked BROKEN [1]:

Doesn't install anything since the last major release: https://github.com/arvidn/libtorrent/issues/4204

[1] ports r520654
